Headline: No Forest Park-bound Blue Line trains between LaSalle and Forest Park
ShortDescription: Forest Park-bound Blue Line service has been temporarily suspended between LaSalle and Forest Park due to a medical emergency at Racine.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Forest Park-bound Blue Line service has been temporarily suspended between LaSalle and Forest Park due to a medical emergency at Racine.

As a result, Forest Park-bound Blue Line trains are operating only between O'Hare and LaSalle at this time.

Shuttle buses are requested between LaSalle and Forest Park to provide connecting service (SOUTHBOUND, ONLY).

Consider other service alternatives that may serve your trip, such as nearby bus routes, or using buses to other rail lines.

See station personnel for further assistance, and pay attention to announcements on trains and at stations for service information.

We are working to restore service as quickly as possible. Allow extra travel time.
